# Stage 5 — Nulls and significance

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
if (!exists("cfg")) {
  source(file.path("..", "R", "00_atlas_setup.R"))
  init.atlas.session(normalizePath("..", winslash = "/"))
}
if (!exists("atlas_env")) atlas_env <- load.atlas.checkpoint(4)
```

```{r stage-05}
source(file.path("..", "R", "stage_05_evt.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "stage_05_nulls.R"))

out <- run_stage_05_nulls(
  atlas_env = atlas_env,
  cfg = cfg,
  checkpoint_every = if (!is.null(cfg$null_checkpoint_every)) cfg$null_checkpoint_every else 50L,
  max_cores = if (!is.null(cfg$null_max_cores)) cfg$null_max_cores else 50L
)
atlas_env <- out$atlas_env
out$global_p
```
